data.title: Coca-Cola Southwest Beverages and Texas Monthly Studio Reveal Winners of Star-Spangled Texas Mural Competition
data.description: Coca-Cola Southwest Beverages (CCSWB) has officially announced that Abilene, Bryan, and Tyler have been chosen as the victorious cities in the Star-Spangled Texas mural competition.

data.title: Bitcoin Below $70,000, But ETFs Keep Buying: What Is Going On?
data.description: This month, Bitcoin spot ETF inflows have surged to approximately $2.5 billion, showing a notable increase in activity despite lackluster price performance. Analyst Shaun Edmondson highlighted the strength of ETF demand, which has stayed robust even amid a sharp decline in prices, bolstering the optimistic long-term outlook. Notably, Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR) is planning to secure up to $42 billion for additional Bitcoin acquisitions, while Morgan Stanley is gearing up to introduce a Bitcoin ETF, underscoring the rising adoption within Wall Street. Additionally, Bitcoin's supply remains constrained, indicating a potential increase in its value.

data.title: CFTC reveals task force for tech such as AI, crypto, and prediction markets to establish regulatory guidelines.
data.description: A task force has been initiated by the CFTC to establish a comprehensive set of regulations for various technologies including AI, cryptocurrencies, and prediction markets. This initiative aims to provide clarity and guidance in areas where regulations are currently lacking. This task force will focus on developing frameworks that govern the use of these technologies in financial markets, with the goal of promoting innovation while ensuring compliance with established rules. The CFTC is taking proactive steps to address the emerging challenges posed by these technologies, signaling a proactive approach to regulation in this rapidly evolving sector.

data.title: The Toy Foundation™ Awards $600,000 in Grants to Bring Play into Pediatric Care for More Than 220,000 Children
data.description: 37 children's hospitals across the nation, catering to under-resourced communities, are receiving grants to support their initiatives. The Toy Foundation (TTF), a branch of The Toy Association, is dedicated to providing comfort to children in these hospitals through the power of play. This initiative aims to help children undergoing medical treatment, with a focus on bringing joy and relief during challenging times.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- SamaCare/
data.description: SamaCare has been recognized as one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies for 2026. The announcement was made on 24-Mar-2026 by SamaCare through PR Newswire. After careful review, the company has made some modifications to the initial news release. More information regarding SamaCare and this achievement can be found at the conclusion of the updated release.

data.title: Smithfield Foods Shares Rise After Strong Q4 Results
data.description: Smithfield Foods, Inc. (NASDAQ: SFD) saw its shares rise after posting strong fourth-quarter results. The company reported an adjusted EPS of 83 cents, surpassing the expected 68 cents. Sales reached $4.227 billion, marking a 7.0% increase from the previous year and exceeding the estimated $4.138 billion. Adjusted operating profit climbed 27.8% year-over-year to $402 million, with the adjusted operating margin growing to 9.5% from 8.0% in the same period last year. Adjusted EBITDA from continuing operations stood at $502 million, up from $402 million, and the adjusted EBITDA margin expanded to 11.9% from 10.2% in the year-ago quarter. By December 28, 2025, the company held $3.837 billion in available liquidity, including $1.539 billion in cash and equivalents.

data.title: ChartHop Launches AI Pro
data.description: ChartHop has announced the launch of AI Pro, a new tool designed to automate workforce strategy. This platform includes 'Agentic Actions' aimed at connecting people data with business execution. The tool is set to revolutionize the way companies approach human resources, with the potential to significantly impact organizational efficiency. The announcement was made simultaneously in New York and Las Vegas.

data.title: Blac Chyna, Princess Love and Yandy Smith Headline Launch of My Butler AL Platform in Los Angeles
data.description: Summer Grays, the creator, is gearing up to introduce My Butler AL during a high-profile Saturday evening launch in Los Angeles. The event will showcase celebrities like Blac Chyna, Princess Love, and Yandy Smith. My Butler AL, a high-end lifestyle and social platform still in beta testing phase, is set to make its mark in the market. The launch event is scheduled for March 24, 2026 in Los Angeles.

data.title: X-lumin Achieves Roundtrip Optical Transmission to LEO Satellite Using 15cm Portable Terminal
data.description: In Merritt Island, Florida, X-lumin has achieved a significant milestone in the realm of Free Space Optics technology. The company's 15cm Optical Ground Terminal (OGT) successfully completed a roundtrip optical transmission to a retroreflector-equipped LEO satellite and was able to track downlink signals that are 106 times dimmer than the current standard of 25µW/m2. This accomplishment was confirmed through repeated testing over multiple passes. Notably, this marks the first instance where a portable, low Size, Weight, Power (SWaP) terminal has achieved a closed roundtrip optical link.

data.title: San José Mineta International Airport Launches AI-Powered IntBot Humanoid Robot, Showcasing Silicon Valley Innovation
data.description: San José Mineta International Airport (SJC) is set to introduce an interactive assistant that will welcome travelers in various languages, provide information, and improve the overall passenger experience. The airport, located in the heart of Silicon Valley, will implement this cutting-edge artificial intelligence technology on March 24, 2026. This move aims to cater to the diverse needs of passengers and enhance their journey through the airport.
